positive: A clean, modern abstract composition featuring a stylized fox head silhouette incorporated into a repeating jungle vine and leaf pattern. The style should be minimal vector art mixed with negative space illustration. The color palette is limited to deep emerald green, burnt orange, and rich indigo blue. Focus on high contrast and bold outlines suitable for textile printing on apparel. Central composition with perfect symmetry. Studio lighting, crisp detail, graphic design, seamless repeat pattern, isolated on a plain background.
negative: text, signature, watermark, logo, blurry, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, low resolution, messy, grayscale, photo realistic, cartoon, messy lines
